Name: MAP_OBJECT_INSTANCE_PARAM
Description: Defines per-instance configuration for map objects, including interaction rules, multiplayer usage permissions, break behavior, and gameplay-related triggers.

Fields.Name: Object Control ID
Fields.Description: Identifier used to link this instance to its object controller logic.

Fields.Name: Bullet ID Slot 0
Fields.Description: Projectile or bullet parameter ID used in slot 0 for this object.

Fields.Name: Damage ID Slot 0
Fields.Description: Damage parameter ID used in slot 0 for this object.

Fields.Name: Touch Region Scale
Fields.Description: Scales the interaction/touch detection area for the object.

Fields.Name: Movable Range
Fields.Description: Maximum distance the object can move or be interacted with.

Fields.Name: Object Type
Fields.Description: Defines the category/type of the object instance.

Fields.Name: Object Control Type
Fields.Description: Defines the control behavior type used for this object instance.

Fields.Name: Label
Fields.Description: Text label or identifier used for grouping or debugging (note: original field likely misspelled 'objLabel').

Fields.Name: Usable by White Phantom
Fields.Description: Determines whether white phantom players can interact with this object.

Fields.Name: Usable by Small White Phantom
Fields.Description: Determines whether small white phantom variants can interact with this object.

Fields.Name: Usable by Dragon Phantom
Fields.Description: Determines whether dragon-form players can interact with this object.

Fields.Name: Usable by Cooperative Blue Phantom
Fields.Description: Determines whether cooperative blue phantoms can interact with this object.

Fields.Name: Usable by Bell Keeper Blue Phantom
Fields.Description: Determines whether adversarial blue phantoms can interact with this object.

Fields.Name: Usable by Dark Phantom
Fields.Description: Determines whether invading black phantoms can interact with this object.

Fields.Name: Usable by Bell Keeper Phantom
Fields.Description: Determines whether Bell Keeper covenant phantoms can interact with this object.

Fields.Name: Usable by Rat King Phantom
Fields.Description: Determines whether Rat King covenant phantoms can interact with this object.

Fields.Name: Usable by Mirror Knight Phantom
Fields.Description: Determines whether Mirror Knight-related phantoms can interact with this object.

Fields.Name: Usable with No Covenant
Fields.Description: Allows interaction when the player has no covenant equipped.

Fields.Name: Usable by Sunlight Covenant
Fields.Description: Allows interaction for Sunlight Warrior covenant members.

Fields.Name: Usable by Guardian Covenant
Fields.Description: Allows interaction for Guardian-type covenant members.

Fields.Name: Usable by Blood Covenant
Fields.Description: Allows interaction for blood-themed invading covenant members.

Fields.Name: Usable by Blue Covenant
Fields.Description: Allows interaction for blue police/protection covenant members.

Fields.Name: Usable by Rat King Covenant
Fields.Description: Allows interaction for Rat King covenant members.

Fields.Name: Usable by Bell Keeper Covenant
Fields.Description: Allows interaction for Bell Keeper covenant members.

Fields.Name: Usable by Dragon Covenant
Fields.Description: Allows interaction for members of the Dragon Path covenant.

Fields.Name: Usable by Champion Covenant
Fields.Description: Allows interaction for champion covenant members.

Fields.Name: Usable by Abyss Covenant
Fields.Description: Allows interaction for Abyss-related covenant members.

Fields.Name: Usable by Enemies
Fields.Description: Determines whether AI enemies can interact with or affect this object.

Fields.Name: Breakable Only by Event
Fields.Description: Restricts object destruction to scripted events only.

Fields.Name: Use Alternate SFX
Fields.Description: Enables switching to an alternative sound effect set.

Fields.Name: Break Object Spawn State ID
Fields.Description: State ID used when spawning breakable object effects or remnants.

Fields.Name: Reset Type
Fields.Description: Defines how and when the object resets to its initial state.

Fields.Name: Temporary Break Object Spawn State ID
Fields.Description: Secondary or temporary state used for break object spawning (likely decorative or conditional).

Fields.Name: IBL Texture ID
Fields.Description: Identifier for image-based lighting (environment reflection) texture.

Fields.Name: Initial Item Drop ID
Fields.Description: Item lottery ID used for initial or first-time item rewards.
